source_text: 3.1.4 Fasteners in the Suspension system are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2 V.3.1.5 All spherical rod ends and spherical bearings on the suspension and steering must be one of: - Mounted in double shear - Captured by having a screw/bolt head or washer with an outside diameter that is larger than spherical bearing housing inside diameter. ## V.3.2 Steering V.3.2.1 The Steering Wheel must be mechanically connected to the front wheels
requirement_text_pred: All spherical rod ends and spherical bearings on the suspension and steering must be one of: - Mounted in double shear
